case_title: CACV OF COLORADO VS. G GONZALES et al

docket_entries.description: COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACV OF COLORADO AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALES, G DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAR-17-2006 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-13-2006 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAR-02-2006
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR FEB-14-2006 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
MINI-MINUTES FOR FEB-14-2006 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212

SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST RUSSELL A. DAVIS, ESQ., FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: FEB-14-2006 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAR-01-2006. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: LETICIA PEREZ. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-03-2006 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE MAR-17-2006 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-03-2006 CONTINUED TO AUG-02-2006 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). MAY-03-2006 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
PRE-TRIAL CALENDAR SWEEP, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR OF AUG-02-2006, OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION FILED (SWEEP)
